Video.summary: Jane crashes the craft rooms of America's most talented and creative makers. In this episode, Jane shows you how to upcycle a plain old t-shirt.
Video.title: Craft Room Crash: Knots of Color Everywhere - DIY Ruffles

Video.summary: Grab a pretty napkin and your champagne bottles and let’s customize it together. Perfect for hostess gifts.

Feeling Nifty: How to Decoupage a Champagne Bottle with Napkins

Video.summary: In this episode, revamp old bedside tables to create this va-va voom vanity. Transform tiles into coolio coasters with exo expert, Danny Sio.

She's Crafty: Vixen Mixen

Video.summary: Jane crashes the craft rooms of America's most talented and creative makers. In this episode, Jane shows you how to use zippers for fashion over function.

Video.summary: Our Dolls LOVE Slime sooooo much we just had to make them their very own SLIME WorkShop!! Check out this Fabulous & Slimy Craft is perfect for your Slime Loving Dolls!

Video.summary: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we bow down to big knits — chunky, quick-to-make projects knit in the most decadent of bulky yarns.
Video.title: The Knit Show: The Big Knits

Image.alt: The Knit Show: The Big Knits
The Knit Show: The Big Knits

Video.title: Moogly: Multi Color Stitch Patterns

Image.alt: Moogly: Big Stitch Baskets
Moogly: Big Stitch Baskets

Video.summary: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we go bag crazy! We share some of our favorite project bags; learn how to crochet a boho-inspired purse; take a field trip to an artisanal mill to see how yarn is made; knit a felted bag made unique with different hardware and straps, and get a quick tip for how your favorite knitting tool can also be used as an integral part of your next, big bag!
Video.title: The Knit Show: The Bag

Image.alt: The Knit Show: The Bag
The Knit Show: The Bag

Video.summary: Don't stop at scarves! Learn how to vary your works with Mary Beth!
Video.title: Arm Knitting: Decreasing

Image.alt: Arm Knitting: Decreasing
Arm Knitting: Decreasing
